name: Feature Request

---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature you would like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution or approach.

## Component

Which SENTINEL component(s) would this affect?

- [ ] Probe Agent
- [ ] Inference Monitor
- [ ] Training Monitor
- [ ] Correlation Engine
- [ ] Audit Ledger
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] SDK
- [ ] Deployment / Helm
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] New component

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
